news.t: John Hancock Investment Management Grows Active Fixed Income ETF Suite with Core and Core Plus Bond ETFs

overview.description: The John Hancock Core Bond ETF (JHCR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in US investment-grade bonds, maintaining a focus on sound credit quality. The fund aims to provide a high level of current income while prioritizing the preservation of capital and liquidity JHCR was launched on Dec 18, 2024 and is issued by John Hancock.

data.title: John Hancock Investment Management Grows Active Fixed Income ETF Suite with Core and Core Plus Bond ETFs
data.text: BOSTON, Dec. 18, 2024 /PRNewswire/ - John Hancock Investment Management, a company of Manulife Wealth and Asset Management, announced today that it has launched John Hancock Core Bond ETF and John Han...
